samples.xml_description:
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Implement a module for edge detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="ZERO" description="State ZERO">0</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="ONE" description="State ONE">1</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <name>i_state</name>
            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
        </reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <name>i_next_state</name>
            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <parablock>
            <statement>
                <text>i_state</text>
                <operator>=</operator>
                <case>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                </case>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <text>i_next_state</text>
                <operator>=</operator>
                <case>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                    <case-item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <item>
                                    <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                                </item>
                                <item>
                                    <unary-operator>
                                        <operator>=</operator>
                                        <right>
                                            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                                        </right>
                                    </unary-operator>
                                    <left>
                                        <input id="a"/>
                                    </left>
                                </item>
                            </and>
                            <result>
                                <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                            </result>
                        </condition>
                    </case-item>
                </case>
            </statement>
        </parablock>
        <parablock>
            <statement>
                <text>rise</text>
                <operator>=</operator>
                <condition>
                    <binary-operator>
                        <left>
                            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                        </left>
                        <operator>/=</operator>
                        <right>
                            <text>i_state</text>
                        </right>
                    </binary-operator>
                </condition>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <text>down</text>
                <operator>=</operator>
                <condition>
                    <binary-operator>
                        <left>
                            <enum-value id="ONE"/>
                        </left>
                        <operator>/=</operator>
                        <right>
                            <text>i_state</text>
                        </right>
                    </binary-operator>
                </condition>
            </statement>
        </parablock>
    </implementation>
</module>
